findings.message: New runtime service `widgetizer` is defined only in `dev.yml`, a dev-scoped overlay. Per Taskfile.yml, `dev.yml` is composed only by `dev` (base.yml + observability.yml + dev.yml) and `dev:lite` (base.yml + dev.yml); the deploy composition (infra/deploy/strategy.sh / README) builds staging/prod from `<env>.yml` + services.yml + observability.yml and does NOT include dev.yml. So `widgetizer` reaches dev only and is silently absent from CI/staging/prod. It is a backing workload (pinned image ghcr.io/acme/widgetizer:1.4.0 consuming WIDGETIZER_DB_URL against the app Postgres), not local-developer-experience tooling (Traefik/mailcatcher/DB admin UI), so it should not live in a dev-only overlay.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service to `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery overlay staging/prod compose) or define it in the deployed `staging.yml`/`prod.yml` overlays so it reaches every environment. If it is intentionally dev-only, record that decision in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted from staging/prod.
